title: Virtual Winding Temperature Sensing
description: Estimate the temperature of an electric motor windings using a regression model
long_description: This project allows you to develop a regression model capable of estimating the temperature of an motor windings using the measured die temperature, quadrature current and motor speed (rpm). The model is suitable for real-time, low powered embedded applications like thermal management and motor control in automotive systems.
